title: Chain 1/8: Adopt a Dog
scene: 你去动物收容所咨询领养。（对话链：养宠物）

turns.cn: 想看哪类？大型还是中型？
turns.en: What size are you looking for? Large or medium?

turns.cn: 中型，性格温顺，最好已绝育。
turns.en: Medium, calm temperament, preferably already neutered.

turns.cn: 这只金毛混种两岁，很亲人。
turns.en: This golden mix is two years old. Very friendly.

turns.cn: 能带它出去走走吗？
turns.en: Can I take him for a walk?

turns.cn: 可以，后院牵绳区。
turns.en: Sure. Leashed area in the back.

turns.cn: 很喜欢，领养流程是什么？
turns.en: I love him. What's the adoption process?

title: Chain 2/8: Pet Store Shopping
scene: 你在宠物店买狗粮和用品。（对话链：养宠物）

turns.cn: 找什么？狗还是猫？
turns.en: What are you looking for? Dog or cat?

turns.cn: 中型犬的成犬粮，无谷物配方。
turns.en: Adult food for a medium dog, grain-free.

turns.cn: 这款卖得好，三十磅装六十九块。
turns.en: This one sells well. Sixty-nine for a thirty-pound bag.

turns.cn: 有试吃小包装吗？
turns.en: Do you have a small trial size?

turns.cn: 有，五磅的十九块九。
turns.en: Yes, a five-pound bag for nineteen ninety-nine.

turns.cn: 先拿小的，再加一个磨牙棒。
turns.en: I'll try the small one, plus a chew toy.

title: Chain 3/8: First Vet Visit
scene: 你带狗狗去宠物医院体检。（对话链：养宠物）

turns.cn: 它最近食欲怎么样？
turns.en: How's his appetite been lately?

turns.cn: 正常，但昨天吐了一次。
turns.en: Normal, but he vomited once yesterday.

turns.cn: 有没有吃不该吃的东西？
turns.en: Has he eaten anything he shouldn't?

turns.cn: 可能咬了沙发上的填充物。
turns.en: He might have chewed stuffing from the couch.

turns.cn: 我检查一下，应该不严重。
turns.en: Let me examine him. It should be fine.

turns.cn: 需要打疫苗吗？
turns.en: Does he need any shots?

turns.cn: 狂犬疫苗明年到期，今天可以一起打。
turns.en: His rabies shot expires next year. We can do it today.

title: Chain 4/8: Dog Park
scene: 你在狗公园和其他狗主人聊天。（对话链：养宠物）

turns.cn: 你的狗好活泼！什么品种？
turns.en: Your dog is so energetic! What breed is he?

turns.cn: 金毛混种，叫 Buddy，一岁半。
turns.en: Golden mix. His name is Buddy. He's a year and a half.

turns.cn: 他经常来这个公园吗？
turns.en: Does he come here often?

turns.cn: 每天下班后来，不然在家拆家。
turns.en: Every day after work, or he destroys the house.

turns.cn: 哈哈，这边下午人少一些。
turns.en: Ha! It's less crowded here in the afternoon.

turns.cn: 是啊，记得带水，喷泉夏天才开。
turns.en: Yeah. Bring water. The fountain only runs in summer.

title: Chain 5/8: Pet Grooming
scene: 你带狗去宠物店洗澡剪毛。（对话链：养宠物）

turns.cn: 今天做什么？洗澡还是全套？
turns.en: What are we doing today? Bath or full groom?

turns.cn: 全套，毛太长了，夏天热。
turns.en: Full groom. His coat is too long for summer.

turns.cn: 指甲也剪吗？
turns.en: Trim his nails too?

turns.cn: 要，他怕吹风机，请轻一点。
turns.en: Yes. He's scared of the dryer. Please go gently.

turns.cn: 大概一小时，好了打电话。
turns.en: About an hour. I'll call when he's done.

turns.cn: 我在隔壁咖啡店等。
turns.en: I'll wait at the coffee shop next door.

title: Chain 6/8: Pet Boarding
scene: 你要出差，咨询宠物寄养。（对话链：养宠物）

turns.cn: 下周出差五天，能寄养中型犬吗？
turns.en: I'm traveling five days next week. Can you board a medium dog?

turns.cn: 可以，每天三十五，含散步两次。
turns.en: Yes. Thirty-five a day, two walks included.

turns.cn: 需要自带狗粮吗？
turns.en: Should I bring his own food?

turns.cn: 建议自带，减少肠胃不适。
turns.en: We recommend it to avoid stomach issues.

turns.cn: 疫苗记录要带来吗？
turns.en: Should I bring vaccination records?

turns.cn: 要，狂犬和犬瘟必须有效。
turns.en: Yes. Rabies and distemper must be current.

title: Chain 7/8: Dog Got Sick
scene: 出差回来发现狗拉肚子，你打电话给兽医。（对话链：养宠物）

turns.cn: 它拉肚子两天了，精神还行。
turns.en: He's had diarrhea for two days. Energy is okay.

turns.cn: 寄养期间换食了吗？
turns.en: Did his diet change during boarding?

turns.cn: 换了店里的粮，可能不适应。
turns.en: They used their kibble. Maybe he didn't adjust.

turns.cn: 先禁食十二小时，再喂清淡的。
turns.en: Fast for twelve hours, then bland food.

turns.cn: 需要来诊所吗？
turns.en: Should I bring him in?

turns.cn: 明天不好转再来。
turns.en: Come in tomorrow if it's not better.

title: Chain 8/8: Back to Normal
scene: 狗好了，你恢复每天遛狗 routine。（对话链：养宠物）

turns.cn: Buddy 好多了吧？几天没见。
turns.en: Buddy's better? Haven't seen you in a few days.

turns.cn: 好了，出差寄养吃坏肚子。
turns.en: He's fine. Got an upset stomach from boarding food.

turns.cn: 以后寄养自带粮，我家也这样。
turns.en: Always bring your own food. We do that too.

turns.cn: 学到了，今晚还遛狗吗？
turns.en: Lesson learned. Walking tonight?

turns.cn: 七点楼下见。
turns.en: See you downstairs at seven.

turns.cn: 好，到时见。
turns.en: Sure. See you then.
